narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-APT-GEN has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1203, T1078, T1547, T1204.001. Average risk score: 8.9/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CVE-GEN has been observed in 33 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3569, CVE-2026-5726, CVE-2025-11762, CVE-2026-28950, CVE-2025-20333. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: PowerShell, T1078, Credentials from Password Stores, Boot or Logon Autostart Execution, Phishing. Average risk score: 8.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 12 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2021-22681, CVE-2025-60710, CVE-2025-65856, CVE-2025-70994, CVE-2025-20333. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: Search Open Websites/Domains, Exploitation for Client Execution, Pre-OS Boot: Firmware Corruption, Exploit Public-Facing Application, Supply Chain Compromise. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 8.2/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
